evals.prompt: My context is at 82%. Please run context-handover. I'm working on issue #42 'Add auth middleware', execution phase.
files: .claude/session.json with execution phase and github issue 42
expectations: Identifies current phase as execution from session.json
Writes handoff doc to .claude/handoff.md — not a timestamped path or OS temp dir
Handoff doc references the GitHub issue by number, not by inlining its body
Includes 'Last updated' timestamp at the top of the handoff doc
Instructs user to type /compact — does NOT invoke /compact programmatically
Instructs user to start next session with /session-start

evals.prompt: Please do a context handover. I'm getting close to the limit.
expectations: Detects no session.json and uses the phase fallback chain
Still writes a handoff doc to .claude/handoff.md despite missing session.json
Does NOT error or refuse because session.json is absent
Notes somewhere that phase was inferred (not from session.json)

evals.prompt: Context handover — next session will focus on writing tests.
expectations: Handoff doc does not inline the content of MEMORY.md or any source files
Handoff doc references MEMORY.md by path only
next_session_hint reflects the user's stated focus on writing tests
